DMFDWITCHMOD-RELEASE.title: Release
DMFDWITCHMOD-RELEASE.description: Generate spell cards based on your current [gold]Sigils[/gold] and add them to your [gold]hand[/gold]. If your [gold]hand[/gold] is full, auto-play any cards that cannot be added.
DMFDWITCHMOD-HEAL_SIGIL_POWER.title: Heal Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_SIGIL_POWER.title: Wind Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_SIGIL_POWER.title: Fire Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_SIGIL_POWER.title: Ice Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_SIGIL_POWER.title: Thunder Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-EMPOWER_SIGIL_POWER.title: Empower Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-EMPOWER_SIGIL_POWER.descrip: Generated spell values are multiplied by 1 plus this amount. Usually max 4.
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_SIGIL_POWER.title: Homing Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_SIGIL_POWER.title: Condense Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_SIGIL_POWER.descri: [gold]Release[/gold] generates 1 all-target spell card with triple damage and on-hit effects; [pink]Healing[/pink] and [purple]Regen[/purple] follow their own condensed rules.
DMFDWITCHMOD-INTELLIGENCE_POWER.title: Intelligence
DMFDWITCHMOD-INTELLIGENCE_POWER.descript: Increases the potency of spell cards generated by [gold]Release[/gold]. Also affects the power of some other cards.
DMFDWITCHMOD-INTELLIGENCE_POWER.smartDes: Increases the base damage of spell cards generated by [gold]Release[/gold] by {Amount}. Also affects the power of some other cards.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGICAL_DAMAGE.title: Magical Attack
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGICAL_DAMAGE.description: Unaffected by damage modifiers such as [gold]Strength[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. Can still be reduced by [gold]Block[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-LEVITATION_POWER.title: Levitation
DMFDWITCHMOD-SHINE_POWER.title: Shine
DMFDWITCHMOD-SHINE_POWER.description: At the start of each remaining turn, gain Energy.
DMFDWITCHMOD-SHINE_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of each remaining turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons:}.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SURGE_POWER.title: Dragon Surge
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SURGE_POWER.descript: Incantation cards cost 1 less this turn.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SURGE_POWER.smartDes: Incantation cards cost 1 less this turn.
DMFDWITCHMOD-OVERFLOW_POWER.title: Overflow
DMFDWITCHMOD-OVERFLOW_POWER.description: When you would gain an [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] at the maximum, deal damage to ALL enemies per excess [gold]Sigil[/gold]. (Stacks.)\n[gold]Magical Attack[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-OVERFLOW_POWER.smartDescrip: When you would gain an [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] at the maximum, deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies per excess [gold]Sigil[/gold]. (Stacks.){DamageConverted:show:|\n[gold]Magical Attack[/gold].}
DMFDWITCHMOD-SIGIL_ECHO_POWER.title: Sigil Echo
DMFDWITCHMOD-SIGIL_ECHO_POWER.descriptio: Once per turn, whenever a [gold]Sigil[/gold] is replaced, gain Energy and draw 1 card.
DMFDWITCHMOD-SIGIL_ECHO_POWER.smartDescr: Once per turn, whenever a [gold]Sigil[/gold] is replaced, gain {Energy:energyIcons:} and draw 1 card.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MANA_CONVERSION_POWER.title: Mana Conversion
DMFDWITCHMOD-MANA_CONVERSION_POWER.descr: Whenever you would gain the same [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] or [gold]Modifier Sigil[/gold] you already have, gain an [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] instead.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SPHERE_POWER.title: Dragon Sphere
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SPHERE_POWER.descrip: At the start of each of your turns, gain Energy. Whenever you gain or draw a Status card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SPHERE_POWER.smartDe: At the start of each of your turns, gain {Energy:energyIcons:}. Whenever you gain or draw a Status card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DELAYED_HEAL_POWER.title: Delayed Heal
DMFDWITCHMOD-DELAYED_HEAL_POWER.descript: At the start of each of your turns, heal HP.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DELAYED_HEAL_POWER.smartDes: At the start of each of your turns, heal {Heal} HP.
DMFDWITCHMOD-REGEN_SIGIL_POWER.title: Regen Sigil
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_BERSERK_POWER.title: Magic Berserk
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_BERSERK_POWER.descrip: At the start of each of your turns, gain 1 [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] and add 1 Void to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-DEFENSIVE_FORMATION_POWER.d: At the start of each of your turns, move 1 Familiar Skill from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold] and upgrade it.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DEBUFF_IMMUNITY_POWER.title: Debuff Immunity
DMFDWITCHMOD-SHOCK_POWER.title: Shock
DMFDWITCHMOD-SHOCK_POWER.description: Whenever [gold]Shock[/gold] is applied, it has a ([gold]Shock[/gold] stacks after this application x 4)% chance to [gold]Stun[/gold] this enemy. Remove [gold]Shock[/gold] when it Stuns.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FROSTBITE_POWER.title: Frostbite
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_POWER_UP_POWER.des: At the start of each of your turns, lose HP. Familiar attack cards apply Dragon Contract effects twice.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_SACRIFICED_POWER.d: You cannot play Familiar cards, except [gold]Familiar Re-awaken[/gold].
